Finance and Support Office

MENU

In the Finance and Support Office, the transactions related
to the execution of the Ministry of Development, TUBITAK, Istanbul Development
Agency, European Union Supported Funds, Consultancy Projects,
University-Industry Cooperation Projects and BAP supported projects carried out
by the University are followed up.
